subcodes.first_line: O true servant of the Ancient Beauty! Thy letter was received and the details concerning his eminence the leader were ascertained from the publications [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال قدم نامه رسید و تفاصیل جناب زعیم معلوم گردید از نشریات
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @growth of the Cause, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @courtesy; culture [adab]
